metadata.notes: Supported-field-only calculation configuration fixture for iztro-rs. Cases cover yearDivide normal/exact for converted birth-year and palace facts, fixLeap false/true for leap-month chart facts, and ageDivide normal/birthday for horoscope nominal-age resolution. It is not a full upstream semantic clone fixture.
metadata.generation_command: npm ci --prefix tools/iztro-reference && npm run dump:calculation-config --prefix tools/iztro-reference -- --write
